name: Aasimar
description: Aasimar are mortals who carry a spark of the Upper Planes within their souls.

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage and Radiant damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.description: As a Magic action, you can touch a creature and roll a number of d4s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains a number of Hit Points equal to the total rolled. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.description: When you reach level 3, you choose one of the following options: Heavenly Wings (flight), Radiant Soul (extra radiant damage), or Necrotic Shroud (frighten enemies). You can transform as a Bonus Action for 1 minute.

name: Dragonborn
description: Dragonborn are the scions of dragons, possessing the power of breath weapons.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: You have a Draconic Ancestry that determines your damage resistance and the damage type of your Breath Weapon.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of draconic energy in a 15-foot cone or a 30-foot line. Damage is 1d10 (increasing at higher levels).

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.description: Starting at level 5, you can manifest spectral wings as a Bonus Action for 10 minutes, giving you a Fly Speed equal to your Speed.

name: Dwarf
description: Dwarves are bold and hardy warriors, known for their skill in battle and craftsmanship.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition. You also have Resistance to Poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your HP maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you can gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes while on a stone surface. You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Elf
description: Elves are a magical people of long lifespans, associated with the natural world or arcane magic.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition. Magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: Choose High Elf, Wood Elf, or Drow. Each gives specific cantrips and spells as you level up.

name: Gnome
description: Gnomes are small, energetic, and possess a natural affinity for magic and invention.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against spells.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.description: Choose Forest Gnome (Minor Illusion) or Rock Gnome (Prestidigitation/Tinkering).

name: Goliath
description: Goliaths are massive beings with the blood of giants in their veins.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description: Choose one: Cloud Giant (Teleport), Fire Giant (Extra damage), Frost Giant (Cold damage/Slow), Hill Giant (Knock prone), Stone Giant (Reaction damage reduction), or Storm Giant (Lightning damage reaction).

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: Starting at level 5, you can use a Bonus Action to become Large for 10 minutes. You have Advantage on Strength checks and your Speed increases by 10 feet.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Halfling
description: Halflings are small, nimble, and surprisingly brave folks.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for a d20 Test, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You have proficiency in the Stealth skill.

name: Human
description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: You gain Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You gain the Skilled feat or another Origin feat of your choice.

name: Orc
description: Orcs are strong, resilient, and possess a fierce drive to succeed.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description: You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. You can't use this trait again until you finish a Long Rest.

name: Tiefling
description: Tieflings bear a hellish heritage that shapes their appearance and magic.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Otherworldly Resilience
traits.description: You have Resistance to Fire damage (or another type based on lineage).

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description: Choose Abyssal, Chthonic, or Infernal. Each grants specific cantrips and spells as you level up.
